title: Better Multishot
description: Now the Multishot enchantment works the same way as on the Bedrock Edition: all three projectiles can hit the same target, which will deal a lot of damage.
body:
## With Datapack (All three arrows hit the target):
![with](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lIONMg0U/images/cbee988b94822dbf709bb1447e85bcc5fb978cdd.gif)

## Without Datapack (Only one arrow hit the target):
![without](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lIONMg0U/images/4957460668fe4670178d4184ca7da563d0844856.gif)
